result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 18:   WHERE a.createddate >= p.start_dt
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(oldvalue__c), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT a.old_owner AS agent_id, a.case_id
  FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND a.createddate < p.end_dt
    AND a.old_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.old_owner <> ''
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
    AND a.old_owner <> a.new_owner
),
initial_assignments AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (c.id)
    regexp_replace(trim(c.id::text), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, case_id FROM initial_assignments
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND a.createddate < p.end_dt
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT hc.agent_id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(oldvalue__c), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT a.old_owner AS agent_id, a.case_id
  FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND a.createddate < p.end_dt
    AND a.old_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.old_owner <> ''
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
    AND a.old_owner <> a.new_owner
),
initial_assignments AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (c.id)
    regexp_replace(trim(c.id::text), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, case_id FROM initial_assignments
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND a.createddate < p.end_dt
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT hc.agent_id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT (DATE '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt,
         DATE '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(oldvalue__c), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    createddate
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT a.old_owner AS agent_id, a.case_id
  FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND a.createddate < p.end_dt
    AND a.old_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.old_owner <> ''
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
    AND a.old_owner <> a.new_owner
),
initial_assignments AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (c.id)
    regexp_replace(trim(c.id::text), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE c.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate < p.end_dt
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, case_id FROM initial_assignments
  UNION
  SELECT new_owner AS agent_id, case_id FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.createddate >= p.start_dt
    AND a.createddate < p.end_dt
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY agent_id
)
SELECT hc.agent_id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT (timestamp '2023-04-10' - INTERVAL '12 months') AS start_dt,
         timestamp '2023-04-10' AS end_dt
),
assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(trim(caseid__c), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(oldvalue__c), '^#', '') AS old_owner,
    regexp_replace(trim(newvalue__c), '^#', '') AS new_owner,
    createddate::timestamp AS created_ts
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c = 'Owner'
),
transfers AS (
  SELECT a.old_owner AS agent_id, a.case_id
  FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.created_ts >= p.start_dt
    AND a.created_ts < p.end_dt
    AND a.old_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.old_owner <> ''
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
    AND a.old_owner <> a.new_owner
),
initial_assignments AS (
  SELECT 
    regexp_replace(trim(c.id::text), '^#', '') AS case_id,
    regexp_replace(trim(c.ownerid), '^#', '') AS agent_id
  FROM "Case" c
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_dt
    AND c.createddate::timestamp < p.end_dt
),
handled AS (
  SELECT agent_id, case_id FROM initial_assignments
  UNION
  SELECT a.new_owner AS agent_id, a.case_id
  FROM assignments a
  CROSS JOIN params p
  WHERE a.created_ts >= p.start_dt
    AND a.created_ts < p.end_dt
    AND a.new_owner IS NOT NULL AND a.new_owner <> ''
),
handled_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) AS cases_handled
  FROM handled
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT case_id) > 0
),
transfer_counts AS (
  SELECT agent_id, COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM transfers
  GROUP BY agent_id

SELECT hc.agent_id
FROM handled_counts hc
LEFT JOIN transfer_counts tc ON tc.agent_id = hc.agent_id
ORDER BY COALESCE(tc.transfer_count, 0) ASC, hc.cases_handled DESC, hc.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
